name: Aldridge & Charles Marine
description: A captain-owned yachting firm based in South Florida. We handle yacht brokerage, management and detailing, refit and engineering, charter, and crew placement for owners along the Atlantic coast and across the Caribbean.

skills.name: List articles
skills.description: List published articles and guides on buying, selling, managing, detailing, and crewing yachts in South Florida and the Caribbean.
examples: Show me articles on buying a yacht in Florida
What guides do you have on yacht detailing?

skills.name: Get article
skills.description: Fetch a single article by its slug. Returns title, description, category, image, and full content as HTML.
examples: Get the article on how to buy a yacht in Florida

skills.name: List yachts for sale
skills.description: List the motor and sailing yachts we currently represent for sale across South Florida and the Caribbean.
examples: What sailing yachts do you have under 60 feet?

skills.name: Submit inquiry
skills.description: Submit a written inquiry about a specific vessel, service, or general matter. We reply personally.
examples: Submit an inquiry about your management service
